subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast responded to the Call and art enkindled with the Fire that blazed forth in the Sinai Tree! Ages of the Covenants have passed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اجاب الندآء و اشتعل بالنار الموقده فی سدره السیناء قد مضی دهور امن العهود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
